title: Bundle Size Budget Configuration
description: Defines bundle size budgets for the client application per route and per chunk.

total.description: Maximum total JS size in KB (uncompressed) across all client chunks.

shared.description: Maximum size in KB for shared chunks (framework, common vendor code).

perRoute.description: Per-route JS budgets in KB. Each key is a route path, value is max KB.

perChunk.description: Maximum size in KB for any individual JS chunk. Prevents any single file from growing too large.
